nasb.text: But about midnight Paul and Silas were praying and singing hymns of praise to God, and the prisoners were listening to them;

esv.text: About midnight Paul and Silas were praying and singing hymns to God, and the prisoners were listening to them,

cnv.text: 約在半夜，保羅和西拉祈禱歌頌　神，囚犯們都側耳聽著。

ccb.text: 半夜，保罗和西拉祷告、唱诗赞美上帝，其他的囚犯都侧耳倾听。

csbs.text: 约在半夜，保罗和赛拉斯祷告、唱诗赞美神，其他的囚犯们都侧耳听着。
